name: harness-factory
description: Build and incrementally improve project-owned agent harnesses for Claude, Codex, and Gemini.

interface.shortDescription: Build, verify, evaluate, and improve agent harnesses
interface.longDescription: Create or incrementally modify a project-owned runtime-neutral harness, render equivalent Claude, Codex, and Gemini adapters, and evaluate harness changes through a low-cost event-driven policy.
defaultPrompt: Build a Claude, Codex, and Gemini harness for this project.
Add an agent, skill, or evaluator to the existing harness.
Verify and evaluate this harness before proposing an improvement.
